ksa_text: Knowledge of infrastructure-as-code principles and tooling (e.g., Terraform, Pulumi) as applied to data platform provisioning, configuration management, reproducibility, and version control.

Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.
